title: desmodium racemosum var. mandshuricum
intro: Desmodium racemosum var. mandshuricum, also known as the Manchurian tick trefoil, is a plant species belonging to the legume family Fabaceae. Traditionally, it is used in herbal medicine to treat various ailments, with its medicinal properties attributed to the presence of saponins and flavonoids. The health benefits associated with Desmodium racemosum var. mandshuricum include reducing inflammation, relieving fever, and acting as an antibacterial agent. In herbal preparations, the plant is often used in teas, infusions, and decoctions, and is also sometimes used as a tincture or in combination with other medicinal plants.
